sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ بَعْضُ الْمَدَارِسِ الْآنَ الذَّكَاءَ الِاصْطِنَاعِيَّ فِي التَّعْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Neke škole sada koriste vještačku inteligenciju u obrazovanju.
sentences.translationEn: Some schools are now using artificial intelligence in education.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا النِّظَامُ الْمُعَلِّمِينَ عَلَى تَنْظِيمِ الدُّرُوسِ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj sistem pomaže nastavnicima da bolje organizuju lekcije.
sentences.translationEn: This system helps teachers organize lessons better.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ كَيْفِيَّةَ التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ التِّقْنِيَّاتِ الْحَدِيثَةِ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenici s lakoćom uče kako se nositi s modernim tehnologijama.
sentences.translationEn: Students learn how to deal with modern technologies easily.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَقِدُ الْوِزَارَةُ أَنَّ التَّكْنُولُوجِيَا سَتُغَيِّرُ مُسْتَقْبَلَ الدِّرَاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ministarstvo vjeruje da će tehnologija promijeniti budućnost studiranja.
sentences.translationEn: The ministry believes that technology will change the future of studying.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ بَرَامِجُ جَدِيدَةٌ تُسَاعِدُ الْأَطْفَالَ فِي حَلِّ الْوَاجِبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Postoje novi programi koji pomažu djeci u rješavanju zadaće.
sentences.translationEn: There are new programs that help children solve homework.
